functions.name: LOAD_DETAIL
functions.description: Loads a stored employee-level payroll output value for one output key, month, and unit ID.

parameters.name: output_key
parameters.description: Config output key, for example payroll.output.base_salary_total.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Any Excel date in the forecast month.

parameters.name: user_key
parameters.description: Optional User ID/email. If omitted, the function uses the User ID from the Heavy Calc Assist task pane.

functions.name: RUNTIME_CHECK
functions.description: Temporary runtime probe for Excel Desktop custom functions.

functions.name: POST_CHECK
functions.description: Temporary POST request probe for Excel Desktop custom functions.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: POST shape to test: json, text, empty, or form.

parameters.name: backend_url
parameters.description: Optional backend URL. If omitted, the production backend is used.

functions.name: BATCH_QUEUE_CHECK
functions.description: Temporary shared-queue probe for Excel Desktop custom functions.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Shared token used to group nearby calls.

functions.name: TEXT_BATCH_CHECK
functions.description: Temporary text/form batch POST probe for Excel Desktop custom functions.

parameters.name: user_key
parameters.description: User ID/email used for the detail lookup.

parameters.name: output_key
parameters.description: Config output key, for example payroll.output.base_salary_total.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Any Excel date in the forecast month.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Transport to test: text or form.

parameters.name: backend_url
parameters.description: Optional backend URL. If omitted, the production backend is used.
